title: lasiorrhiza multifida
intro: Lasiorrhiza multifida, also known as multifida lasiorrhiza, is a plant species in the family Ranunculaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and antioxidant effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant is often prepared for consumption through teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be purchased from herbal shops or made at home under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
